items.title: Visa: Speculations Are Over, Buying Diversified IT And Finance In One (Rating Upgrade)
items.description: Visa upgraded to 'Buy' for strong financials, evolving B2B focus, exceptional profitability, and reliable growth, despite slower EPS projections. Read more on V stock here.
